title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End
synopsis: An elf mage and her former party members' journey back to the place where their adventure started, exploring connections and looking forward after the hero's passing.
notes: Absolutely gorgeous direction, calming animation pace, and deep emotional resonance.

tasks.text: Listen to Evan Call's soundtrack stream
Collect and read the manga volume 1

title: Solo Leveling Season 2
synopsis: Sung Jinwoo returns to explore deeper dungeons and unravel the secrets behind the mysterious system that gave him the power to level up infinitely.
notes: Highly anticipated action animation! Season 1 was incredibly exciting.

tasks.text: Set up a watch party with friends
